findings.title: FreedomIntelligence/Awesome-AI4Med
findings.description: A curated list of medical LLMs, multimodal systems, datasets, benchmarks, and more. 🏥

findings.title: camel-ai/crab
findings.description: 🦀️ CRAB: Cross-environment Agent Benchmark for Multimodal Language Model Agents. https://crab.camel-ai.org/

findings.title: zeyofu/BLINK_Benchmark
findings.description: This repo contains evaluation code for the paper "BLINK: Multimodal Large Language Models Can See but Not Perceive".     https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.12390  [ECCV 2024]

findings.title: TsinghuaC3I/MedXpertQA
findings.description: [ICML 2025] MedXpertQA: Benchmarking Expert-Level Medical Reasoning and Understanding

findings.title: rustyneuron01/AI-Generated-Content-Detection
findings.description: Multi-modal AI-generated content detection: image, video, and audio. Benchmarks, training code (DINOv2, DINOv3, ReStraV, BreathNet), and evaluation pipeline for real vs. synthetic classification with calibration-aware metrics.

findings.title: uni-medical/GMAI-MMBench
findings.description: GMAI-MMBench: A Comprehensive Multimodal Evaluation Benchmark Towards General Medical AI.

findings.title: agentsea/osuniverse
findings.description: Benchmark of complex, multimodal desktop-oriented tasks for advanced GUI-navigation AI agents

findings.title: zeyofu/Commonsense-T2I
findings.description: Code for Commonsense-T2I Challenge: Can Text-to-Image Generation Models Understand Commonsense? [COLM 2024]

findings.title: SufyanDanish/VLM-Survey-
findings.description: A comprehensive survey of Vision–Language Models: Pretrained models, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, adapters, and benchmark datasets

findings.title: yh-yao/awesome-edge-ai-agents
findings.description: Curated list of papers, frameworks, benchmarks, and applications for multimodal AI agents (LLMs, text-to-image, speech, world models, etc.) on mobile and edge devices.

findings.title: VectorInstitute/humanibench
findings.description: HumaniBench is a benchmark suite for evaluating Large Multimodal Models on seven Human-Centered AI principles namely Fairness, Ethics, Understanding, Reasoning, Language, Inclusivity, Empathy, and Robustness.

findings.title: January-ai/food-scan-benchmarks
findings.description: Benchmarks of January's AI Food Scanner against other multimodal LLMs

findings.title: multimodalAI/omaib
findings.description: Open Multimodal AI Benchmark by the UK Open Multimodal AI Network.  ⭐ Star to support our work!

findings.title: trng28/ViMRHP
findings.description: A Vietnamese Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Review Helpfulness Prediction via Human-AI Collaborative Annotation.

findings.title: fisherman611/gaia-agent
findings.description: "GAIA Agent: An AI system automating solutions for the GAIA benchmark with tools for reasoning, code execution, data interpretation, and multimodal tasks."

findings.title: Scimoose/AI-Bench-Archive
findings.description: A repository that aggregates commonly used benchmarks to test LLM and multimodal models on different modalities and functionalites.

findings.title: theyashwanthsai/MREB
findings.description: Multimodal Reasoning and Ethics Benchmark (MREB) is an open source benchmark designed to assess the cross-domain capabilities of AI models.

findings.title: swordlidev/Awesome-AI-Search
findings.description: This repository offers an in-depth review of these advancements, focusing on Text-based AI Search, Web Browsing Agents, Multimodal AI Search, Benchmarks, Software, and Products.

findings.title: MicDZ/MANBench
findings.description: This repo contains evaluation code for the paper "MANBench: Is Your Multimodal Model Smarter than Human?" [ACL 2025 Findings]

findings.title: LayerDynamics/smlx
findings.description: Smol MLX—the complete framework for lightweight AI on Apple Silicon. Sub-1B parameter models (vision, language, audio, multimodal) with production tools: quantization, caching, agents, benchmarks, and OpenAI-compatible API. Engineered for M4's unified memory.
